release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 59. Updates all human-visible product branding to Leah 2R Displays across the firmware, OLED startup messages, Wi-Fi setup portal, web UI, WhatsApp messages, diagnostics, and support labels. Retains the existing OTA product identifier and leah-2r-242.local alias for backward compatibility. Includes configurable local buzzer mute duration, live mute remaining status, per-alarm buzzer selection, alarm-episode snooze reset, Nightscout SAGE and IOB/COB auto-read, midnight-to-midnight daily bolus totals, centered night screen, caregiver WhatsApp routing, and Wi-Fi profile handling.
